tasks: Initialize a new Next.js project using `create-next-app` with TypeScript.
Design core page layouts (Home, About, Projects, Contact) using Figma.
Develop reusable UI components (Navbar, Footer, ProjectCard) using React and Tailwind CSS.
Populate pages with personal information, project details, and contact forms within Next.js components.
Initialize a Git repository and push the entire project to GitHub.
Connect the GitHub repository to Vercel for continuous deployment.
Configure a custom domain for the deployed website within Vercel settings.
